description: Shadow Abomasnow lead with Shadow Quagsire safe swap and Corviknight closer. Abomasnow's unique Ice/Grass typing provides strong neutral coverage with Powder Snow, Weather Ball, and Energy Ball, while Quagsire handles Electric and Fire threats and Corviknight rounds out the team.
